title: SecretMetadataRequest
description: SecretMetadataRequest schema from HashiCorp Vault API

max_versions.description: Maximum number of versions to keep for this specific secret.

cas_required.description: When true, write operations require CAS parameter.

delete_version_after.description: Duration after which versions are automatically soft-deleted.

custom_metadata.description: User-provided key-value metadata stored alongside the secret.
